## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`

## Security / Canon Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, private prompts, service-role keys or wallet keys added.
- [ ] No fake winners, verdicts, transactions, applications or active Day 0 cells.
- [ ] Public copy does not promise income, floor price, utility or guaranteed work.
- [ ] Any new external link is real or clearly marked as coming soon.
